intent: Polish author dialog and card UI: section groupings, backdrop dim+blur, card name color consistency, short field widths, monospace URLs, specialty paste handler, granular store selectors, extract shared AuthorAboutSection

findings.title: border-2 className on Input overrides base border width but may interact unexpectedly with Tailwind v4 cascade
findings.suggested_fix: Verify that border-2 correctly overrides the base 1px border and does not strip border-input color. If needed, use border-2 border-input explicitly.
findings.why_it_matters: The Input component's base className includes 'border border-input' (1px solid). Adding only 'border-2' sets width to 2px but the color still comes from border-input in the base class, which is correct. However, if Tailwind v4 treats border-2 as a standalone border shorthand, it could reset the color to currentColor. Visual verification is recommended.
evidence: border-2 in Tailwind sets border-width: 2px but does not set a border-color, so border-input from the base should persist

findings.title: AuthorAboutSection component name starts with 'Author' which may read redundantly in an authors directory
findings.suggested_fix: Rename to AboutSection if the directory context is sufficient, or keep AuthorAboutSection for explicit import clarity. Current name is acceptable.
findings.why_it_matters: Inside src/app/components/authors/, 'Author' prefix on every component adds noise. But outside the directory (e.g., AuthorProfile.tsx imports it), the prefix helps clarity. This is a style preference.
evidence: Existing pattern: AuthorFormDialog, DeleteAuthorDialog, AuthorsSyncErrorBanner all use Author prefix

findings.title: No automated test for backdrop overlayClassName or dialog section headings in AuthorFormDialog
findings.suggested_fix: Consider adding a test that verifies the dialog renders section headings (Profile, Media, Links, Quote). This would catch accidental removal during refactoring.
findings.why_it_matters: The section grouping is a key UX improvement (R4). Without a test, a future refactor could flatten the form fields back into a single list without detection.
evidence: Existing tests cover specialty paste, validation, edit mode
No assertion for section heading text like 'Profile', 'Media', 'Links', 'Quote'
Section headings are structured as <h3> elements with aria/text content that can be targeted via screen.getByRole('heading', {name: 'Profile'})

findings.title: mergeSpecialtiesFromInput is a module-level function but closely coupled to AuthorFormDialog internals
findings.suggested_fix: No action needed — the function is small, tested through integration tests, and colocation with its only consumer is appropriate.
findings.why_it_matters: Minor maintainability note: the function is used exclusively by handleAddSpecialty and handleSpecialtyPaste within AuthorFormDialog. Keeping it as a file-scoped helper is appropriate.
evidence: mergeSpecialtiesFromInput is only called in handleAddSpecialty (line 166) and handleSpecialtyPaste (line 179)
It uses flattenSpecialties from @/lib/authors for tokenization
Private helper pattern keeps the component focused

findings.title: handleSpecialtyPaste does not handle paste of already-present specialties in the specialtyInput field content
findings.suggested_fix: The current behavior handles the paste correctly: mergeSpecialtiesFromInput deduplicates via case-insensitive Set, and the leftover content in specialtyInput is cleared on paste. No bug here — the handler correctly replaces the input content after extracting paste tokens.
findings.why_it_matters: Edge case consideration: if the user selects text in the input before pasting, the handler correctly replaces the selection (via slice(0,start)+text+slice(end)). This is correct behavior.
evidence: Line 175-177: const combined = specialtyInput.slice(0, start) + text + specialtyInput.slice(end)

residual_risks: backdrop-blur-sm on the Radix overlay may have variable performance on low-end mobile devices; the blur is cosmetic and should be acceptable for a dialog backdrop
testing_gaps: No test for section heading rendering (Profile/Media/Links/Quote)
No test verifying backdrop overlayClassName is applied
Granular store selector mock pattern test coverage is implicit (integration tests pass, validating the mock works)
learnings: Past solutions doc: docs/solutions/developer-experience/authors-sync-silent-reload-modal-layout-vitest-sonner-2026-05-04.md — dialog flex shell pattern and isDirty guard confirmed in place
Unified course card pattern: docs/solutions/best-practices/unified-course-card-shared-shell-pattern-2026-04-20.md — overlay token pattern referenced for backdrop approach
